arts.ttl: Julen Lopetegui 'given two games' to save West Ham job as ex-Chelsea boss waits in wings
arts.sum: Julen Lopetegui has been unable to shake off the uncertainty over his future at West Ham - and the club's hierarchy are already lining up a potential replacement

arts.ttl: Ipswich Town vs. Chelsea team news: Enzo Maresca makes five changes for Premier League fixture
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca makes five changes to his Chelsea XI for Monday's Premier League game at Ipswich Town.

arts.ttl: Cole Palmer market value exceeds £100m as Chelsea handed major transfer boost
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca will be looking to streamline his squad in January - and he will be happy to see the value of his players has shot up following their incredible start to the season. The squads Premier League performances, alongside their domination in the Conference League, has helped increase the players' market values according to transfermarkt .

arts.ttl: Ipswich vs Chelsea - Premier League: Live plus updates from Aston Villa vs Brighton
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest score, team news and updates as Chelsea travel to Portman road to take on Ipswich Town and Aston Villa host Brighton in Premier League action.

arts.ttl: Chelsea will make their worst signing of the Todd Boehly era if they spend £100m on reported target - opinion
arts.sum: They would have to be crazy to pay that.

arts.ttl: Chelsea make first January addition, 48 hours before the transfer window opens, as £15m star jets in to boost Enzo Maresca's squad
arts.sum: After a busy summer that saw the Blues sign 13 players, Enzo Maresca's side have had a bright first half of the season - and they look set to be boosted by the arrival of a teenage star.

arts.ttl: Club informed as Chelsea make decision on player – Will be joining Blues earlier than expected
arts.sum: Chelsea have made the decision to bring Aaron Anselmino back to the club in the January transfer window and end his return to Boca Juniors early. That’s according to journalist César Luis Merlo, who reports that Boca have already been made aware of Chelsea’s plans. The Blues signed Anselmino from Boca in the summer in The post Club informed as Chelsea make decision on player – Will be joining Blues earlier than expected appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Why is Ipswich vs Chelsea not on TV? How to watch Premier League match in UK
arts.sum: Ipswich Town are set to face Chelsea at Portman Road in the Premier League - but fans will not be able to watch the game on TV in the UK tonight

arts.ttl: Ranking the top five Chelsea goals in 2024, including Cole Palmer winner and Moises Caicedo screamer
New Chelsea points deduction fear emerges as Premier League decision made
arts.sum: Chelsea face an anxious wait to see if they have satisfied the Premier League's financial rules ahead of a New Year's Eve deadline, according to reports. In the past, these financial deadlines have not been a big issue for clubs but since last season, the Premier League has decided to clamp down on those who may have breached the rules..
